title: Anti-pickup
description: a pvp focused anti-pick up mod to help with inventory management in survival multiplayer servers
body: a client-side Fabric mod that automatically drops unwanted items from your inventory. You choose what to drop using blacklist or whitelist mode with built-in toggles for common categories like armor, swords, tools, totems, crystals, anchors, glowstone, obsidian, and blocks, plus custom item IDs. It works when your inventory is open by default, but it can run in the background too. All settings are configurable in-game through Mod Menu.
